% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
1. ! [X0] : (perform_often(X0) => attend_events(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (perform_often(X0) | inactive_disinterested(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. attend_events(bonnie) <=> student_attends_school(bonnie) [input(axiom)]
7. ((young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie) & chaperone_dances(bonnie)) | ~(young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie))) => (student_attends_school(bonnie) | inactive_disinterested(bonnie)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~(((young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie) & chaperone_dances(bonnie)) | ~(young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie))) => (student_attends_school(bonnie) | inactive_disinterested(bonnie))) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ! [X0] : (attend_events(X0) | ~perform_often(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
14. (~student_attends_school(bonnie) & ~inactive_disinterested(bonnie)) & ((young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie) & chaperone_dances(bonnie)) | (~young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) | ~wish_academic(bonnie))) [ennf transformation 8]
15. ~student_attends_school(bonnie) & ~inactive_disinterested(bonnie) & ((young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_academic(bonnie) & chaperone_dances(bonnie)) | ~young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) | ~wish_academic(bonnie)) [flattening 14]
16. (attend_events(bonnie) | ~student_attends_school(bonnie)) & (student_attends_school(bonnie) | ~attend_events(bonnie)) [nnf transformation 6]
17. ~perform_often(X0) | attend_events(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
18. perform_often(X0) | inactive_disinterested(X0) [cnf transformation 2]
22. student_attends_school(bonnie) | ~attend_events(bonnie) [cnf transformation 16]
27. ~inactive_disinterested(bonnie) [cnf transformation 15]
28. ~student_attends_school(bonnie) [cnf transformation 15]
42. ~attend_events(bonnie) [forward subsumption resolution 22,28]
43. inactive_disinterested(X0) | attend_events(X0) [resolution 18,17]
44. attend_events(bonnie) [resolution 43,27]
46. $false [forward subsumption resolution 44,42]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
